title: Nut-Free Energizing Queso Fundido
description: A creamy, energizing Venezuelan dish made with semi-skimmed milk and a touch of fermentation for a delightful snack or side dish.

ingredients.name: Fermentation Culture (e.g. Kefir or Yogurt Cultures)
Nut-Free Flavoring Blend (optional, e.g. Marmite or Nutella substitute)

instructions: In a small bowl, mix the semi-skimmed milk with the fermentation culture and salt.
Let the mixture sit at room temperature for about 10 minutes to allow the cultures to activate.
Heat vegetable oil in a frying pan over medium heat until it reaches about 350°F (175°C).

Gently pour the fermented milk mixture into the hot oil and cook, stirring occasionally, until it forms cheese curds and becomes golden brown on the bottom. This should take approximately 2-4 minutes per side.
If desired, add a pinch of salt or your chosen flavoring blend to enhance the taste.
